headline: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From Darden Restaurants’ Report

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Darden Restaurants, Raises Price Target to $235
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Gregory Francfort   maintains Darden Restaurants (NYSE:DRI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $230 to $235.
